title: Include work schedule in burndown chart
excerpt: It would be nice if the burndown chart could include work schedules defined in the Admin - Work Schedule. E.g. it treats it like a weekend day and greys out and updates the ideal progress line with the public holiday or …

posts.author: JonPoole (Jon Poole)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice if the burndown chart could include work schedules defined in the Admin - Work Schedule. E.g. it treats it like a weekend day and greys out and updates the ideal progress line with the public holiday or other non working days that have been defined
